mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.product_catalog_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, slug, brand, product_status, category_id, category_name, hsn_code, base_price, weight_grams, is_returnable, return_window_days, created_date, description, short_description, country_of_origin, warranty_months, primary_sku, variant_count, total_available_qty, total_reserved_qty, stock_status, primary_fc, seller_id, seller_name, seller_tier, seller_rating, avg_rating, review_count, rating_5_pct, rating_4_pct, rating_3_pct, rating_2_pct, rating_1_pct, sentiment_positive_pct, sentiment_neutral_pct, sentiment_negative_pct, units_sold_30d, revenue_30d, conversion_rate, return_rate, views_30d, violations_count, report_count ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), -- Product core p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.brand, p.state_id, p.category_id, c.name, p.hsn_code, p.base_price, p.weight_grams, p.is_returnable, p.return_window_days, p.created_time, p.description, p.short_description, p.country_of_origin, p.warranty_months, -- Primary variant (SELECT pv.sku FROM hm_product.product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pv.sku LIMIT 1), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = p.id), -- Inventory (aggregated across all FCs) COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.reserved_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) < COALESCE((SELECT MIN(inv.low_stock_threshold) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END, (SELECT inv.primary_fc FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id LIMIT 1), -- Seller p.supplier_id, s.business_name, s.tier, s.rating, -- Reviews (aggregated) COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) * 100 FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id), 0), -- Star distribution (basis points) COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 5 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 4 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 3 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 2 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 1 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), -- Sentiment (rating >= 4 = positive, 3 = neutral, <= 2 = negative) COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 4 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating = 3 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating <= 2 THEN 1 END) * 10000 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id)::INT, 0), -- Performance (last 30 days from order_items) COALESCE((SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = p.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(oi.total_price) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = p.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), 0, -- conversion_rate: requires clickstream data, computed separately 0, -- return_rate: requires return data, computed separately 0, -- views_30d: requires clickstream data, computed separately -- Compliance COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.product_activity_log pal WHERE pal.product_id = p.id AND pal.action = 'VIOLATION'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(r.report_count) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id), 0) FROM hm_product.products p LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.product_variant_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, variant_id, variant_name, sku, ean, mrp, selling_price, available_qty, reserved_qty, inbound_qty, variant_status, attributes_json ) SELECT pv.id, p.tenant, NOW(), pv.product_id, pv.id, COALESCE( (SELECT STRING_AGG(va.attribute_value, ' / ' ORDER BY va.attribute_key) FROM hm_product.variant_attributes va WHERE va.variant_id = pv.id), pv.sku ), pv.sku, pv.ean, pv.mrp, pv.selling_price, COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.reserved_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.inbound_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.status, 'UNKNOWN'), (SELECT JSON_OBJECT_AGG(va.attribute_key, va.attribute_value) FROM hm_product.variant_attributes va WHERE va.variant_id = pv.id)::TEXT FROM hm_product.product_variants pv JOIN hm_product.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.category_config_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, category_id, name, slug, parent_id, path, depth, display_order, active, commission_rate_bps, is_gated, return_policy_days, max_shipping_weight_grams, listing_min_images, listing_min_desc_length, hsn_code, gst_rate_pct, cess_rate_pct, required_attributes_json, required_attributes_count, product_count, active_product_count, seller_count, gmv_30d, orders_30d, return_rate_30d ) SELECT c.id, c.tenant, NOW(), c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.parent_id, c.path, c.depth, c.display_order, c.active, c.commission_rate_bps, c.is_gated, c.return_policy_days, c.max_shipping_weight_grams, c.listing_min_images, c.listing_min_desc_length, -- Tax (JOIN tax_category_mapping → tax_rates) COALESCE(tcm.hsn_code, ''), COALESCE((SELECT tr.gst_rate FROM hm_tax.tax_rates tr WHERE tr.hsn_code = tcm.hsn_code LIMIT 1), 0), COALESCE((SELECT tr.cess_rate FROM hm_tax.tax_rates tr WHERE tr.hsn_code = tcm.hsn_code LIMIT 1), 0), -- Required attributes COALESCE( (SELECT JSON_AGG(ad.label) FROM hm_product.category_attribute_mapping cam JOIN hm_product.attribute_definitions ad ON cam.attribute_id = ad.id WHERE cam.category_id = c.id)::TEXT, '[]' ), COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.category_attribute_mapping cam WHERE cam.category_id = c.id), 0 ), -- Product counts COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.category_id = c.id), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.category_id = c.id AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.supplier_id) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.category_id = c.id AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0), -- Performance (last 30 days) COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(oi.total_price) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN hm_product.products p2 ON oi.product_id = p2.id WHERE p2.category_id = c.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN hm_product.products p2 ON oi.product_id = p2.id WHERE p2.category_id = c.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), 0 -- return_rate_30d: computed separately FROM hm_product.categories c LEFT JOIN hm_tax.tax_category_mapping tcm ON tcm.product_category = c.name

INSERT INTO hm_query.brand_registry_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, brand_id, brand_name, brand_slug, company_name, country_of_origin, industry_category, brand_website, contact_email, brand_status, verified_at, created_time, product_count, authorized_seller_count, trademark_count, violation_count, active_violation_count, brand_health_score, counterfeit_removed ) SELECT b.id, b.tenant, NOW(), b.id, b.brand_name, b.brand_slug, b.company_name, b.country_of_origin, b.industry_category, b.brand_website, b.contact_email, b.state_id, b.verified_at, b.created_time, -- Cross-schema: product count COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.brand = b.brand_name), 0), -- Authorized sellers COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_brand_registry.authorized_sellers ase WHERE ase.brand_id = b.id AND ase.status = 'APPROVED'), 0), -- Trademarks COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_brand_registry.brand_trademarks bt WHERE bt.brand_id = b.id), 0), -- Violations (all) COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_brand_registry.ip_violations iv WHERE iv.brand_id = b.id), 0), -- Active violations COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_brand_registry.ip_violations iv WHERE iv.brand_id = b.id AND iv.state_id NOT IN ('RESOLVED', 'DISMISSED')), 0), -- Brand health score (latest analytics) COALESCE((SELECT ba.brand_health_score FROM hm_brand_registry.brand_analytics ba WHERE ba.brand_id = b.id ORDER BY ba.reporting_period DESC LIMIT 1), 0), -- Counterfeit removed (latest period) COALESCE((SELECT ba.counterfeit_listings_removed FROM hm_brand_registry.brand_analytics ba WHERE ba.brand_id = b.id ORDER BY ba.reporting_period DESC LIMIT 1), 0) FROM hm_brand_registry.brands b

INSERT INTO hm_query.attribute_definition_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, attribute_id, code, label, input_type, filterable, searchable, required, display_order, variation_count, product_count, category_count, options_json, options_count ) SELECT ad.id, 'homebase', NOW(), ad.id, ad.code, ad.label, ad.input_type, ad.filterable, ad.searchable, ad.required, ad.display_order, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT va.variant_id) FROM hm_product.variant_attributes va WHERE va.attribute_key = ad.code), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pav.product_id) FROM hm_product.product_attribute_values pav WHERE pav.attribute_id = ad.id), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.category_attribute_mapping cam WHERE cam.attribute_id = ad.id), 0), COALESCE((SELECT JSON_AGG(ao.label ORDER BY ao.sort_order) FROM hm_product.attribute_options ao WHERE ao.attribute_id = ad.id)::TEXT, '[]'), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.attribute_options ao WHERE ao.attribute_id = ad.id), 0) FROM hm_product.attribute_definitions ad

INSERT INTO hm_query.attribute_set_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, set_id, name, attribute_count, group_count, product_count, categories_json, attributes_json, created_time ) SELECT ast.id, ast.tenant, NOW(), ast.id, ast.name, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.attribute_set_attributes asa WHERE asa.attribute_set_id = ast.id), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asg.attribute_group_id) FROM hm_product.attribute_set_groups asg WHERE asg.attribute_set_id = ast.id), 0), 0, -- product_count: computed separately (needs product→set mapping) '[]', -- categories_json: computed separately COALESCE((SELECT JSON_AGG(ad.label ORDER BY asa2.sort_order) FROM hm_product.attribute_set_attributes asa2 JOIN hm_product.attribute_definitions ad ON asa2.attribute_id = ad.id WHERE asa2.attribute_set_id = ast.id)::TEXT, '[]'), ast.created_time FROM hm_product.attribute_sets ast
